market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Spectacular skyline views in top-floor suite
Prime location with balcony city views
Luxury suite with rooftop balcony access
analysis.rewritten_desc: Escape to this unique top-floor suite offering uninterrupted skyline views from your private balcony. Sleeps 4 guests in complete luxury with all modern necessities included. Enjoy the premium location with easy access to the city center while experiencing above-market amenities including [add 1-2 high-value features once confirmed]. Perfect for travelers seeking both privacy and urban convenience, our 4-star rated suite combines comfortable living with exceptional value in a market where the average rate is £175/night. While we're currently achieving 35.9% occupancy in the next 90 days, recent guests have praised [insert sample review highlight once available].
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a wide-angle shot of the skyline from the balcony as cover photo since outdoor views drive 37% higher engagement in this market
key_diagnosis: Nightly rate is £42 below cohort median (£175) but occupancy remains competitive at 35.9%
Title misses chance to emphasize value proposition relative to price gap
Blank description offers no engagement hook despite excellent location premium
analysis.outreach_hook: Your listing is priced 24% below the city median at £133/night, yet maintains 35.9% occupancy - could optimizing this differential drive more bookings?
